sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 50

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 50:1
items.html:
(to the question) Hasadim de MA de MA
Aba, plainly, is called MA. And "Hasadim de MA de MA in Aba" means: the Hasadim [mercies] that are the MA of Aba, who is called MA plainly. They are the discernments of Chochma and ZA of Bina of MA. (p. 805, Item 102)
